ddls:
CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the race took place */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date of the race */,
  "race_time" TEXT /* Time when the race started */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the race */,
  "track_length" INTEGER /* Length of the track in meters */,
  "track_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the track */,
  "race_type" TEXT /* Type of race */,
  "prize_money" TEXT /* Total prize money for the race */,
  "number_of_participants" INTEGER /* Number of horses participating in the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_venue FOREIGN KEY ("venue") REFERENCES venues ("venue_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "horses" (
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each horse */,
  "horse_name" TEXT /* Name of the horse */,
  "breed" TEXT /* Breed of the horse */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the horse */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trainer of the horse */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the horse */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the horse */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the horse was born */,
  "sire" TEXT /* Name of the horse's father */,
  "dam" TEXT /* Name of the horse's mother */,
  "number_of_wins" INTEGER /* Number of races won by the horse */,
  "total_earnings" TEXT /* Total prize money earned by the horse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horses_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jockeys" (
  "jockey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jockey */,
  "jockey_name" TEXT /* Name of the jockey */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Jockey's license number */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the jockey */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the jockey */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the jockey has been racing professionally */,
  "number_of_wins" INTEGER /* Number of races won by the jockey */,
  "total_earnings" TEXT /* Total prize money earned by the jockey */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Current weight of the jockey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jockey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Name of the trainer */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Trainer's license number */,
  "stable_name" TEXT /* Name of the stable */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the trainer */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the trainer has been training horses professionally */,
  "number_of_wins" INTEGER /* Number of races won by horses under the trainer's guidance */,
  "total_earnings" TEXT /* Total prize money earned by horses trained by the trainer */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization of the trainer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horse */,
  "jockey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jockey */,
  "starting_number" INTEGER /* Starting number of the horse */,
  "starting_price" REAL /* Starting price or odds */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight carried by the horse */,
  "horse_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the horse before the race */,
  "jockey_strategy" TEXT /* Strategy the jockey plans to use */,
  "pre_race_odds" REAL /* Odds of the horse winning the race before the race starts */,
  "post_race_odds" REAL /* Odds of the horse winning the race after the race ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_participants_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_participants_jockey_id FOREIGN KEY ("jockey_id") REFERENCES jockeys ("jockey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_participants_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "place" INTEGER /* Final place of the horse */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Finish time of the horse */,
  "margin" TEXT /* Margin behind the winner */,
  "in_running_position" TEXT /* Positions during the race */,
  "section_times" TEXT /* Section times during the race */,
  "speed_rating" INTEGER /* Speed rating of the horse in the race */,
  "stamina_rating" INTEGER /* Stamina rating of the horse in the race */,
  "jockey_performance_rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating of the jockey in the race */,
  "horse_performance_rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating of the horse in the race */,
  "winning_distance" INTEGER /* Distance by which the horse won the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES race_participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the venue */,
  "track_type" TEXT /* Type of track */,
  "track_lengths" TEXT /* Different lengths of tracks available at the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of spectators the venue can hold */,
  "facilities" TEXT /* Facilities available at the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "betting_odds" (
  "odds_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of odds */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "odds" REAL /* Current odds for the horse */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Time when the odds were last updated */,
  "bookmaker" TEXT /* Name of the bookmaker offering the odds */,
  "betting_type" TEXT /* Type of bet */,
  "stake" TEXT /* Amount of money staked on the bet */,
  "payout" TEXT /* Potential payout if the bet wins */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("odds_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_betting_odds_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES race_participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., enthusiast, professional, admin) */,
  "preferred_venue_id" INTEGER /* Preferred venue of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "account_balance" TEXT /* Account balance for betting purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_preferred_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification the user wants to receive */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content the user is interested in */,
  "notification_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of notifications */,
  "content_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of content */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Preferred time for receiving notifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment left by the user */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was posted */,
  "user_rating" INTEGER /* User's overall rating of the race (1-5 stars) */,
  "user_review_title" TEXT /* Title of the user's review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_reviews_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the prediction */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the predicted horse */,
  "predicted_outcome" TEXT /* Predicted outcome for the horse */,
  "confidence_level" INTEGER /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "prediction_type" TEXT /* Type of prediction */,
  "prediction_method" TEXT /* Method used to make the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horse */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the horse */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was recorded */,
  "speed_rating" INTEGER /* Speed rating of the horse in past races */,
  "stamina_rating" INTEGER /* Stamina rating of the horse in past races */,
  "jockey_performance_rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating of the jockey in past races */,
  "horse_performance_rating" INTEGER /* Performance rating of the horse in past races */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id")
)
